title: Explosions Dont Break Items
description: Explosions Dont Break Items, loose items near explosions just get launched, but not deleted.
body:
Explosions Dont Break Items, it does what it says.

Includes TNT, Creepers and should include modded explosions, tested with Sortilege and Explosive Arrows.

It still launches items around so you can propel them using explosions.

I recommend changing the gamerule blockExplosionDropDecay to false, so that explosions also drop all of the damaged blocks.
